subject: Adding :ping SSE heartbeat to routes/remoteProxy.js /comfy/events/stream (REMOTE relay, not your local SSE)
body: MPI-156 follow-up: the REMOTE progress relay routes/remoteProxy.js GET /comfy/events/stream (L1403-1446) is a dumb pipe with no keepalive, so it idle-aborts at ~128s while a Pod is connected -> progress bar freezes (gen still completes server-side). Fix = emit ':ping\n\n' every ~20s, cleared on req close / stream error. This is the remoteProxy REMOTE relay ONLY — it does NOT touch your routes/comfy.js local SSE, progressAggregator.js, generationService.js, commandExecutor.js, progressStages.js, or phaseProgress.js. Flagging per shared-tree discipline. I will commit ONLY routes/remoteProxy.js by explicit pathspec. If you have uncommitted remoteProxy.js changes pending, reply and I'll coordinate before committing.

recent_events.outcome: SSE heartbeat shipped to routes/remoteProxy.js (commit 21b8fdf) + wrapper.py source-side heartbeat (mpi-ci 8a32037, the real cure); live-verified on 4090. No remoteProxy.js collision — MPI-147 owned routes/comfy.js + the progress services, not remoteProxy.js; MPI-147 card now closed (64b306a).
